title: Redstone Warden
description: The warden of the deep has a pounding headache. He won't appreciate being woken up...
body:
This resource pack changes the texture of the Warden into an advanced piece of redstone technology; The Guardian.

Feedback and Suggestions:

yoshiq222@gamil.com

**Inspiration:**

[https://www.planetminecraft.com/mob-skin/redstone-monster-5736848/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mob-skin/redstone-monster-5736848/)
